conn.errIntro: Security software or a firewall blocked BibleClip's screen from loading. Please try the steps below in order.
conn.errAdmin: Right-click the program and choose [Run as administrator].
conn.errWhitelist: Add BibleClip to the exceptions (allow list) in Windows Defender or your antivirus.
conn.errReboot: Restart your computer and try again.
dotnet.errBody:
BibleClip can't start because the .NET Framework failed to load.

Click OK to download the Microsoft .NET Framework 4.8 installer (about 120MB) right away. Install it, restart your computer, and launch BibleClip again.

(Tip: add the BibleClip folder to your antivirus/security exceptions so it isn't blocked.)
setview.formatNote: ※ English versions (ESV/NKJV, etc.) are always output in English style with hyphens.
setview.orderHead: Output order · versions used when copying
search.placeholder: Keyword · reference · code  (e.g. love / Jn 1:1 / H7225)
search.modeTitle: Multi-word search: AND = all terms / OR = any term
search.empty: Type a search term, or copy #keyword from another app.
drawer.logEmpty: References caught while monitoring will appear here.
cart.title: Today's Sermon Verses
cart.empty: Verses you add appear here. Use ＋ on search results or the activity log.
present.qsPlaceholder: Type a reference or keyword, then Enter (e.g. Jn 1:1)
present.hint: F2 search · +/− font size · ESC to exit
modal.title: Settings
modal.readingFontNote: Drop .ttf/.otf fonts into the fonts folder (in the data folder) to see them here.
modal.pollNote: Shorter intervals detect faster but use a bit more CPU.
modal.aliasNote: Register your own book-name abbreviations for reference recognition.
alias.title: Manage aliases
alias.note: Register your own book-name abbreviations. A number may appear only at the very start (e.g. 1Jn → 1 John). Putting a number after letters (e.g. Jn1) is rejected — it would clash with chapter numbers.
alias.errFormat: Invalid alias (digits only at the start, at least one letter)
alias.noBooks: Could not load the book list
modal.searchNav: Jump to the passage when a search result is clicked
modal.autoCopy: Auto-copy the top result on search (clipboard + activity log)
card.tip.linkSelect: Choose a scripture card to link
card.lock.needTwo: You can lock only when there are 2 or more scripture cards
card.lock.needReceiver: At least one scripture card must receive clipboard verses
card.lock.unlockHint: Unlock — this card will also receive clipboard verses
card.lock.lockHint: Lock — this card won't receive clipboard verses
card.empty:
No cards.
Add one with the ＋ Text · ＋ Original · ＋ Lexicon buttons at the top right.
card.clickStrong: Click a Strong's number on an original-language word
card.noLexModule:
No lexicon module installed.
Put a Korean/English dictionary file (.dct) in the original_lang folder to see definitions.
card.toast.freeOnePlace: The free version allows only one card (free placement unlocks in Premium)
card.toast.maxBible: You can add up to {max} scripture cards
card.toast.freeOne: The free version allows only one card (unlocks in Premium)
toast.keepOneVersion: At least one version must be kept
order.empty: No versions to copy with. Add one below.
search.strongNoResults: No verses contain this Strong's code (개역한글S).
search.strongResultMeta: Reverse search [{code}] · {count} result(s) (개역한글S) — click a verse to copy
note.title: Note
note.placeholder: Write your reflection on this verse…
update.available: New version v{latest} available — current v{current}
update.requiredBody: Current v{current} — you must update to v{latest} to keep using the app.
update.applying: Applying update… the app will restart shortly.
toast.installUseReleases: Please download from the releases page.
err.install_source_mode: Auto-install isn't available in source-run mode. Please use the releases page.
err.install_no_info: No update info. Please check for updates first.
err.install_unsupported_os: Auto-install isn't supported on this OS.
killswitch.blocked: This version is no longer available.
